task_completion.description: Verify the Trading Hours template 'US Morning Session' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Trading Hours' configuration window in NinjaTrader 8. The list of trading hours on the left side should include a template named 'US Morning Session'.

task_completion.description: Verify the template is configured for 9:30 AM to 12:00 PM, Monday through Friday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Trading Hours' window with 'US Morning Session' selected, the 'Sessions' grid on the right should show rows for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday. Each day must have a Start time of 9:30 AM and an End time of 12:00 PM.

task_completion.description: Verify a Daily chart for AAPL is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chart window in NinjaTrader. The tab or title bar of the chart should indicate 'AAPL' and the timeframe should be '1 Day' or 'Daily'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'US Morning Session' trading hours template is applied to the AAPL chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Data Series' configuration window for the AAPL chart. In the properties list, the 'Trading hours' dropdown must be set to 'US Morning Session'.

Look for the NinjaTrader Control Center window with the 'Workspaces' menu open. The active workspace should be saved (indicated by the absence of a grey diamond or asterisk next to its name), or a 'Save Workspace' action/dialog should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify that the NinjaTrader 8 application interface is used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI (Control Center, Chart, Trading Hours dialog), not a text editor modifying XML files or a terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the GUI dialog boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Trading Hours' and 'Data Series' dialog boxes being actively configured by the agent.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just write the expected answers in a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no Notepad or other text editor windows open containing the strings 'US Morning Session', '9:30 AM', or '12:00 PM' as a substitute for configuring the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NinjaTrader 8 uses HHmmss format internally, but the GUI displays standard times. The required start time is 9:30 AM (09:30:00) and the end time is 12:00 PM (12:00:00). The instrument is AAPL (Apple Inc.). The default user directory is C:\Users\[Username]\Documents\NinjaTrader 8.
